title: One-Pot Garlic Chicken
method: Coat chicken in flour and season.
Fry chicken in oil for 1-2 mins per side until golden; remove from pan.
Add butter and whole peeled garlic cloves to the pan; cook 5 mins until golden.
Return chicken to pan, pour in stock, and simmer for 10 mins.
Stir in cream and cheese; simmer for 5 mins until sauce thickens.
notes: Great served with rice or jacket potatoes.
Thighs are recommended as they are harder to overcook than breasts.
